topStrip.text: Free Odoo ERP consultation for growing businesses

hero.eyebrow: Odoo ERP, software and IT solutions
hero.title: Accelerate growth with practical ERP implementation.
hero.copy: AimAze Tech Solutions helps you replace scattered tools, manual reporting, and disconnected processes with clean, scalable systems built around the way your business actually works.
hero.imageAlt: Odoo ERP solutions by AimAze Tech Solutions
hero.cardText: CRM, HR, finance, sales, inventory, training and support

about.title: Your technology partner for business operations.
paragraphs: AimAze Tech Solutions LLC delivers ERP implementation, business applications, website development, Salesforce cloud work, and IT management solutions for teams that need better control over daily operations.
We focus on clear requirements, practical configuration, thoughtful customization, and long-term support so your software keeps improving with your business.

problems.title: Is your business outgrowing its current software?
problems.copy: Growth becomes harder when teams rely on spreadsheets, disconnected tools, and manual follow-ups. The right ERP setup gives every team one reliable view of the business.

items.title: Disconnected data
items.text: Sales, inventory, accounting, and operations do not always agree.

items.title: Manual effort
items.text: Your team spends too much time entering data and preparing reports.

items.title: Limited visibility
items.text: Management decisions become slower when live performance is unclear.

items.title: Process gaps
items.text: Approvals, handovers, and customer updates depend on people chasing people.

platform.title: Odoo ERP for the systems your business runs on.
platform.copy: Odoo brings core business functions into one modular platform. AimAze helps you plan the right modules, configure the system, customize what matters, and train your team for adoption.
bullets: No heavy licensing barrier with open-source flexibility
CRM, HR, finance, sales, inventory, projects and more
Custom modules tailored to your business workflows
Integrations with existing systems and reporting needs
Ongoing support, training and process optimization

services.title: Business technology solutions under one roof.
services.copy: From ERP to websites, we build systems that are useful, maintainable, and aligned with the way your team works.

items.title: Odoo ERP Implementation
items.text: Module planning, setup, workflows, access roles, reporting, migration and rollout.

items.title: Software Development
items.text: Custom web systems, APIs, portals, automation tools and internal platforms.

items.title: Application Development
items.text: Business applications that help teams capture, process and act on information.

items.title: Salesforce Cloud Development
items.text: Salesforce customization, automation, data models, reports and integrations.

items.title: IT Management Solutions
items.text: Operational support, documentation, monitoring structure and system administration.

items.title: Website Development
items.text: Professional company websites, landing pages, campaigns and lead-generation pages.

industries.title: Built for businesses that need control and visibility.

process.title: From business process analysis to post-go-live support.

items.title: Discover
items.text: Review current tools, workflows, departments, reports, approvals and pain points.

items.title: Design
items.text: Map modules, roles, data structure, automations, integrations and rollout priorities.

items.title: Deploy
items.text: Configure, customize, test, migrate data, train users and prepare for go-live.

items.title: Improve
items.text: Support users, refine dashboards, optimize workflows and add capabilities over time.

items.question: What does AimAze do?
items.answer: AimAze Tech Solutions delivers Odoo ERP implementation, custom software, application development, Salesforce cloud development, IT management solutions and website development.

items.question: Can Odoo be customized for my business?
items.answer: Yes. Odoo can be configured with standard modules and extended with custom modules, reports, integrations and workflow changes where your process needs something specific.

items.question: Do you provide training and support?
items.answer: Yes. Training and support are part of the delivery approach so your team can use the system confidently after implementation.

items.question: Can AimAze build my company website too?
items.answer: Yes. AimAze also builds professional websites and landing pages for businesses that need a clean online presence and lead-generation flow.

contact.eyebrow: Request a free business process analysis
contact.title: Ready to scale without operational chaos?
contact.copy: Share what you want to improve and AimAze will help you identify the right ERP, software, website or IT solution path.
